name: Pressure Vessel Wall Thickness & MAWP — Cylindrical & Spherical Shell Design
subtitle: Pressure Equipment | Structural Integrity — ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12), ASME BPVC II-D Material Tables

inScope: Pressure Vessel Wall Thickness & MAWP — Cylindrical & Spherical Shell Design
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Material Allowable Stress at Design Temp (S)

standards.code: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)
standards.name: Pressure Vessel Wall Thickness & MAWP — Cylindrical & Spherical Shell Design
standards.description: Pressure Vessel Wall Thickness & MAWP — Cylindrical & Spherical Shell Design — Pressure Equipment, Structural Integrity

formulas.expression: design_pressure_bar * 0.1; t_circ = (shell_geometry === 'cylindrical') ? (P_mpa * inside_diameter_mm / 2) / (allowable_stress_mpa * weld_joint_efficiency - 0.6 * P_mpa) : (P_mpa * inside_diameter_mm / 2) / (2 * allowable_stress_mpa * weld_joint_efficiency - 0.2 * P_mpa)
formulas.reference: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 UG-27(c)(1) — cylindrical
ASME BPVC VIII UG-16(b) — minimum ordered thickness

formulas.expression: t_nominal_mm * (1 - mill_undertolerance_pct/100) - corrosion_allowance_mm; MAWP_mpa = (shell_geometry === 'cylindrical') ? (allowable_stress_mpa * weld_joint_efficiency * t_eff) / (inside_diameter_mm/2 + 0.6*t_eff) : (2 * allowable_stress_mpa * weld_joint_efficiency * t_eff) / (inside_diameter_mm/2 + 0.2*t_eff)
formulas.reference: ASME BPVC VIII UG-27 rearranged for MAWP
Thin-wall criterion: D/t > 20 validates membrane stress approach
ASME BPVC VIII UG-99: hydrostatic test at 1.3× MAWP
ASME BPVC VIII UG-99(b) — 1.3× MAWP at ambient temperature

warnings.source: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)
warnings.message: MAWP within 5% of design pressure: no inspection margin — increase nominal thickness by minimum 10%

warnings.source: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)
warnings.message: High-pressure service with reduced joint efficiency: full radiographic testing (RT) strongly recommended — E=1.0 reduces wall thickness requirement

warnings.source: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)
warnings.message: Low corrosion allowance at elevated temperature: enhanced inspection frequency required per API 510

warnings.source: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)
warnings.message: Sub-zero service: impact testing mandatory per ASME BPVC VIII UCS-66 — verify MDMT (Minimum Design Metal Temperature)

warnings.source: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)
warnings.message: D/t < 10: ultra-thick wall — membrane stress theory invalid; perform finite element or Div.2 Part 5 analysis

warnings.source: ASME BPVC VIII Div.1 (UG-27, UG-99, UW-12)
warnings.message: Large-diameter high-pressure vessel: wind/seismic loading and nozzle reinforcement analysis required per ASME UG-37

verdictText.warn: PASS — High Utilization: Peer Review Required
